generated_note: Regenerate with 'python -m mnik showcase'. Sanitized for public consumption: premium (private-repo) fonts carry a rasterized specimen image only, never the webfont binary. `maturity` is a derived proxy until Phase 4's declared field lands in fontpackage.json (see derive_maturity_proxy).

fonts.name: Abhaya Classic
fonts.description: Abhaya Classic, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: රතු දැල්ලක්, තටුවක කඩතොළු දාරයේ කැලිසේයාවක් මැවීය.
specimen_text.en: A red flair silhouetted the jagged edge of a wing.

fonts.name: Abhaya Libre
fonts.description: A high-contrast text typeface for Sinhala, Tamil and Latin, with extensive coverage for Sinhala, Pali and Sanskrit.

specimen_text.si: අනතුරුව එළඹියේ කඩා වැටෙන පළමු තරුවේ රාත්‍රියයි.
specimen_text.ta: இரவில், எரிநட்சத்திரம் விழுவது போல் அவை வந்தன.
specimen_text.en: Then came the night of the first falling star.

fonts.description: Rajantha, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.en: Waves flung themselves at the blue evening.

fonts.name: Ralex
fonts.description: A Sinhala and Latin typeface in development under the Mooniak foundry.

specimen_text.si: අනතුරුව එළඹියේ කඩා වැටෙන පළමු තරුවේ රාත්‍රියයි.

fonts.name: Ramya
fonts.description: Ramya, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: පටිගත කළ කටහඬ දොරට ඉහළින් වූ ස්පීකරයෙන් නිකුත් විය.
specimen_text.en: The recorded voice scratched in the speaker over the door.

fonts.name: Rashmi
fonts.description: Rashmi, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: දැල්ල නිවී ගියේය, ඔහු කවුළුව තුළින් වලාකුළු දෙස බලා සිටියේය.
specimen_text.en: The flame died, and he stared through the window at the stars.

fonts.name: Sakunthala
fonts.description: Sakunthala, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: වලාකුළින් තොර අහස තද නිල් පැහැයක් ගත්තේය.
specimen_text.en: The sky was cloudless and of a deep dark blue.

fonts.name: Samantha
fonts.description: Samantha, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: බෙහෙවින් අලංකාර නමුත් බිහිසුණු වූ කුණාටුව දෙස, මම බලා සිටියෙමි.
specimen_text.en: I watched the storm, so beautiful yet terrific.

fonts.name: Sandhyanee
fonts.description: Sandhyanee, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: ඇදී යන යාත්‍රාවට ඉතා පහළින් පොළොව දීපිත්මත් අර්ධකවාකාර මතුපිටක් ලෙස දිස් විය.
specimen_text.en: Earth was a brilliantly shining crescent far beneath the flying vessel.

fonts.name: Sarani
fonts.description: Sarani, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: රිදී පැහැ මීදුම යාත්‍රාවේ තට්ටුව හාත්පස පැතිරිණි.
specimen_text.en: Silver mist suffused the deck of the ship.

fonts.name: Singithi
fonts.description: Singithi, a Sinhala typeface from the FontMaster legacy collection, revived by mooniak.

specimen_text.si: රිදී පැහැ මීදුම යාත්‍රාවේ තට්ටුව හාත්පස පැතිරිණි.
specimen_text.en: Silver mist suffused the deck of the ship.

fonts.name: Sinhala Comic Fonts
fonts.description: A set of display fonts designed specifically for Sinhala comics and graphic storytelling.

specimen_text.si: දැල්ල නිවී ගියේය, ඔහු කවුළුව තුළින් වලාකුළු දෙස බලා සිටියේය.

fonts.name: Stick No Bills
fonts.description: A Sinhala stencil display typeface inspired by hand-painted 'stick no bills' wall lettering, by the Mooniak foundry.

specimen_text.si: මගේ ස්වභාව දෙකටම පොදු මතකයක් විය.

fonts.name: Varusi
fonts.description: A condensed display typeface for Sinhala and Latin scripts in development under the Mooniak foundry.

specimen_text.si: ඇදී යන යාත්‍රාවට ඉතා පහළින් පොළොව දීපිත්මත් අර්ධකවාකාර මතුපිටක් ලෙස දිස් විය.
specimen_text.en: Earth was a brilliantly shining crescent far beneath the flying vessel.

fonts.name: Vineetha
fonts.description: A Tamil text typeface exploring multiple styles and variable font technology for Tamil script.

specimen_text.ta: துறைமுகத்திலிருந்து வெளியே வந்த மூன்று மணிநேரத்தில் கப்பலைச் சுற்றி பனிபடர்ந்தது.

fonts.name: Yakkala
fonts.description: An experimental typeface for the permaweb inspired by a Presidential Pica No 70 typewriter sample from the 1964 NOMDA Blue Book.

specimen_text.en: The flame died, and he stared through the window at the stars.

fonts.name: Yaldevi
fonts.description: A narrow trilingual typeface for titles and short text on the web, with Sinhala, Tamil and Latin support.

specimen_text.si: අනතුරුව එළඹියේ කඩා වැටෙන පළමු තරුවේ රාත්‍රියයි.
specimen_text.ta: இரவில், எரிநட்சத்திரம் விழுவது போல் அவை வந்தன.
specimen_text.en: Then came the night of the first falling star.
